summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PyrunAi hero slider redesign (Iteration 3). All hero slider functionality, contact booking system, services page, and general site navigation tested successfully with 100% backend API success rate and full frontend functionality working.
passed_tests: ✅ Hero slider displays all 3 slides with correct content (Power BI, Web Dev, AI/ML)
✅ Slide indicators clickable with active state (green pill)
✅ Text animations on slide changes (fade + slide up)
✅ Hero CTAs link correctly: 'Schedule Free Consultation' → /contact, 'Explore Solutions' → /services
✅ Mobile responsive at 375px viewport - text readable and buttons accessible
✅ Contact page calendar booking end-to-end functionality working
✅ Date and time slot selection working
✅ Form submission with preferred_date and preferred_time fields working
✅ Services page video modals open and close correctly
✅ All pages load correctly (Home, Services, About, Case Studies, Contact)
